1: 'The book of the generation' - Matthew links the coming of Christ to a new beginning for humanity. 'Son of David' is the essential Messianic title, confirming Him as the promised King.
2: Starting with Abraham emphasizes that Jesus is the fulfillment of the covenant made with the father of the faithful.
17: The division into groups of fourteen generations serves as a mnemonic and symbolic device, likely related to the numerical value of the name 'David' (gematria).
